verify.description: Bounded adversarial re-verification. Only low-confidence/uncertain aspects are re-checked; never the whole review.

max_passes_per_aspect.description: Total looks at one aspect incl. the original review (1 review + up to 2 verifier passes = 3).

reverify_below.description: Findings with confidence below this are sent to the verifier.

report_confidence.description: Findings at/above this survive to the report.

escalate_uncertain.description: Still-uncertain after the cap → surface to the human, do not drop.

escalation.description: Spawn-on-doubt: when a reviewer flags uncertain:true, fan a tiny panel (capped) at just that aspect.

scan.description: Run real tools when available (advisory; findings feed D15).

checkout.description: Detach HEAD onto the remote's latest pushed head for the review (restored afterwards), so the reviewers see the most recent pushed code rather than the local checkout. Disable to review the working tree in place.

learning.description: Per-project memory: recurring findings, accepted false-positives, and unresolved questions persist across runs.

ask_on_unresolved.description: Surface unresolved/assumption questions to the user instead of silently assuming.

trackers.description: Issue-tracker key patterns. Tickets are fetched via MCP by the orchestrator — no API tokens are stored or used.

exhaustive.description: Tier C ultrareview-parity passes (completeness critic, taint, generative verify, loop-until-dry). Auto-on at the critical tier or with --exhaustive; they cost extra tokens.

on_critical.description: Run the exhaustive passes automatically when the tier is critical (default true).

max_discovery_rounds.description: Loop-until-dry cap: most reviewer re-sweeps before stopping.
